name: nativeui
description: Create responsive, parent-constrained NativeUI apps with complete dynamic flows across native, desktop, and five authored web lanes.

interface.shortDescription: AI-assisted UI-to-app workflows for every NativeUI target.
interface.longDescription: NativeUI helps Codex choose mobile, web, or desktop delivery, create responsive parent-constrained UI with complete dynamic flows, round-trip screens through the editor, connect durable logic, and release SwiftUI, Compose, Rust, C#, or authored HTML, React, Vue, Angular, and Astro PWAs. Hosted import and export require NativeUI access.
defaultPrompt: Create a responsive, dynamic mobile app. Use flagship SwiftUI plus Compose by default and explain the Rust and C# alternatives.
Create a responsive, dynamic web PWA. Choose HTML, React, Vue, Angular, or Astro and static or SSR; default to HTML static.
Create a responsive desktop app. Default to Rust; explain C# and that macOS SwiftUI is unavailable without a new exporter.
